records.m_Talk_ENG: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't see anyone either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't see anyone either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't see anyone either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is my first time coming here this early in the morning...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is my first time coming here this early in the morning...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is my first time coming here this early in the morning...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Eek
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Eek
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Eek
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something pitch-black just fell over there...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something pitch-black just fell over there...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something pitch-black just fell over there...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... just a tree branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... just a tree branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... just a tree branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A tree branch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A tree branch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A tree branch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the cut is clean. Like someone cut it on purpose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the cut is clean. Like someone cut it on purpose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the cut is clean. Like someone cut it on purpose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. Did a falling branch hit you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. Did a falling branch hit you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. Did a falling branch hit you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you climbing a tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you climbing a tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you climbing a tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every morning, I come out here to trim the branches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every morning, I come out here to trim the branches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every morning, I come out here to trim the branches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were trimming branches?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were trimming branches?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were trimming branches?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll just grow back tomorrow anyway. What's the point of doing something like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll just grow back tomorrow anyway. What's the point of doing something like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll just grow back tomorrow anyway. What's the point of doing something like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I wanted to see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I wanted to see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I wanted to see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, is it trivial?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, is it trivial?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, is it trivial?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Audra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Audra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Audra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anapilis...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anapilis...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anapilis...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't know much about that place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't know much about that place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't know much about that place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sister was like that too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sister was like that too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sister was like that too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sight from that day...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sight from that day...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sight from that day...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll show it to you as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll show it to you as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll show it to you as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Leah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Leah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Leah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The girl... split herself in half.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The girl... split herself in half.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The girl... split herself in half.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no blood flowed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no blood flowed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no blood flowed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She remained conscious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She remained conscious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She remained conscious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will it really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will it really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will it really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person in that picture... who is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person in that picture... who is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person in that picture... who is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Me... from another world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Me... from another world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Me... from another world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Audra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Audra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Audra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The same flower...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The same flower...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The same flower...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because that is her fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because that is her fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because that is her fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's truly horrible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's truly horrible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's truly horrible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so... what can I possibly do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so... what can I possibly do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so... what can I possibly do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will give you the power to do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will give you the power to do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will give you the power to do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How you use that power will be up to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How you use that power will be up to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How you use that power will be up to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can grant such power... then who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can grant such power... then who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can grant such power... then who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that just now...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did I just see?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did I just see?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did I just see?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about over there? Do you see even a single person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't see anyone either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't see anyone either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't see anyone either.

root.m_Talk_DEU: It is my first time coming here this early in the morning...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is my first time coming here this early in the morning...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were trimming branches?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were trimming branches?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were trimming branches?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They'll just grow back tomorrow anyway. What's the point of doing something like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which branches I should cut and which I should leave for the sunlight beneath the tree to sparkle most beautifully.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So in this grand paradise that can even bring the dead back to life, I wondered what kind of scheme you were plotting... and it turns out you've just been playing trivial games like that every day?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, is it trivial?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, is it trivial?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, is it trivial?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But trimming branches has become part of my daily life now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Capturing the most perfect midday sunlight is not such a simple thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Audra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Audra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Audra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was it really you who created this Promised Land?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I modeled it after the scenery of my hometown, where I lived before coming to Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a country called Anapilis, founded after the fall of Avalon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anapilis...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anapilis...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anapilis...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia, do you know where that is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't know much about that place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't know much about that place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't know much about that place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in Elysion... believers who came from a foreign land called Anapilis were persecuted as heretics.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They said those people would stop at nothing to escape the destiny set for them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My sister was like that too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My sister was like that too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My sister was like that too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She tried to sacrifice many lives to change the destiny I was born with... and in the end, she failed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The price of that failure was becoming a test subject for the Mental Printing technology being researched by Elysium Philharmonic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did Thagirion decide to become a monster that destroys the world because of the hatred from back then?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The hatred I felt when I saw my sister trapped inside that cold experiment chamber... was certainly enough to turn someone into such a monster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But hatred is a flame that burns the heart as it blazes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it seems my heart was not strong enough to endure that fierce flame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That day, I stained my hands with human blood. A great deal of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The heart that had been burning so fiercely... turned to ashes before the scattered corpses lying everywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What came after my revenge was not regret or guilt... but the feeling of falling endlessly into a bottomless abyss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I realized the only world I had left to stand on... was that thing floating inside the experiment chamber with my sister's name on it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before my sister left me behind, she told me something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That I was destined to become a Demon Lord, and that she would save me from that destiny no matter what sacrifice it took.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that to do so, she first had to find something called the white frost flower...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But my sister didn't succeed, and she returned to me like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With a heart reduced to ashes, there was only one thing left for me to choose... instead of accepting my fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sight from that day...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sight from that day...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sight from that day...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll show it to you as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll show it to you as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll show it to you as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh? When did you get right in front of me...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Leah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Leah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Leah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When she reached out her hand, a vast darkness suddenly swallowed my vision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the light returned to my sight, a girl stood there, surrounded by a horrific scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before I could even speak to her, the girl swung the weapon she held.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The girl... split herself in half.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The girl... split herself in half.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The girl... split herself in half.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But no blood flowed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But no blood flowed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But no blood flowed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She remained conscious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She remained conscious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She remained conscious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amid that unnatural flow of events, the girl belatedly realized that someone was standing beside her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rather than suddenly appearing, it felt as though they had always been there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That familiar gaze... perhaps it had been watching over the girl since before everything began.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the end of your hardship, have you decided to give up on life?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Everything should have a reason. But I have no such reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I keep living, I will only harm more people. But if I stop here, then all the pain I would face in the future... will end here as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will it really?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will it really?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will it really?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The person in that picture... who is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The person in that picture... who is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The person in that picture... who is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is you. More precisely, you from another world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Me... from another world?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Me... from another world?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Me... from another world?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Audra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Audra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Audra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You believed the world you lived in was a single tree. But in truth, it is nothing more than a single branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as you know, trees grow endless new branches.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Over time, those branches sprout twigs called history and bloom flowers called fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, the flowers that bloom on every branch are the same. Because they all come from the same tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The same flower...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The same flower...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The same flower...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... what will happen to that person who looks like me?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
She will lose someone precious to her
8 8someone she followed like an older sister
8 8and fall into despair, becoming a Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because that is her fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because that is her fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because that is her fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's truly horrible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's truly horrible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's truly horrible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you die, your flower will wither... but it will bloom again on another branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the same appearance and the same scent. The same fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so... what can I possibly do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so... what can I possibly do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so... what can I possibly do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Cut the branches with your own hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each time a branch grows, break it before its flower can bloom.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you cut away every branch like that, then the self that suffers under that fate will also disappear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me to destroy other worlds?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You say something so enormous as if it were simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will give you the power to do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will give you the power to do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will give you the power to do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How you use that power will be up to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How you use that power will be up to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How you use that power will be up to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you can grant such power... then who are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you can grant such power... then who are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you can grant such power... then who are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a being greater than the fairies or the Golden Tree?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Tammiel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The one who sprouted from the very first branch...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that just now...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did I just see?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did I just see?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did I just see?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you saw was the final memory of the girl before she became a Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the reason why the Demon Lord Thagirion seeks to destroy your world.
